        9966:	6ee1      	ldr	r1, [r4, #108]	; 0x6c

        9968:	461a      	mov	r2, r3

        996a:	2900      	cmp	r1, #0

        996c:	f47f aea9 	bne.w	96c2 <tcp_output+0x7e>

        9970:	e7f3      	b.n	995a <tcp_output+0x316>

        9972:	8b63      	ldrh	r3, [r4, #26]

        9974:	f043 0380 	orr.w	r3, r3, #128	; 0x80

        9978:	8363      	strh	r3, [r4, #26]

        997a:	e6a6      	b.n	96ca <tcp_output+0x86>

        997c:	f06f 0003 	mvn.w	r0, #3

        9980:	e6a3      	b.n	96ca <tcp_output+0x86>

        9982:	bf00      	nop

    
tcp_rexmit_rto_commit (20)
